gemini-flash included the period in the description and correctly noted shillings/pence as dots ('. .'). gpt-5-mini omitted the period and incorrectly stated no dots were present. Visual verification confirms '1100 . .'. Selected gemini-flash's values. Adopted 'side: left'.

gemini-flash correctly noted shillings/pence as dots ('. .'). gpt-5-mini incorrectly stated they were omitted. Visual verification confirms '1170 . .'. Selected gemini-flash's values. Adopted 'side: left'.
